message:
feat: expand core policy engine and improve streaming/testkit robustness

Major expansion of the policy engine with comprehensive rule evaluation,
conflict resolution, and structured audit logging. Also:

- Add error handling improvements to SSE and WebSocket streaming crates
- Improve runtime module with additional diagnostics
- Update E2E logging helpers and testkit log scanner for richer output
- Expand policy evaluation with priority-based rule matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
